strict_goal.statement: Estimate which successor proxy path should be replaced first under a combined readiness-plus-gain criterion.
strict_goal.boundary: This block estimates replacement priority. It does not yet execute the replacement.

strict_verdict.core_answer: Online recovery should be replaced first under an execution-first criterion because it is far more ready to run, even though successor inventory remains the larger exactness-gain target under a gain-first criterion.
main_hard_gaps: inventory has the larger eventual gain but much weaker immediate execution readiness
online recovery is the practical first replacement, not the mathematically largest replacement
both paths still need real dense exports before the gain estimate can become an achieved gain

next_large_blocks: Execute the online recovery dense export first to gain a fast real exactness lift.
Immediately after that, execute the successor inventory dense export to unlock the larger exactness gain.
Recompute successor restoration after each replacement rather than waiting for both to finish.
